productDisplayName: Puma Men Fine Striped Polo Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Blue polo T-shirt with orange stripes, has a ribbed, spread collar, buttoned placket, embroidered jumping cat on the left chest, short sleees with ribbed cuffs and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This T-shirt from puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This piece's crush-worthy colour and stylish cut is an off-duty must have. Pair this piece with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
